Searching 40_projects for that identifier found exactly two canonical project records: 40_projects/2026_03_26_house_mesh/README.MD and 40_projects/2026_04_25_harbor_body/README.MD. Reading both records showed status `active` in each, so zero Bix-linked projects are PLANNED.
